name: agent-signal
tagline: Guides implementing/extending LobeHub's Agent Signal event pipeline: sources, signals, actions, policies, and async workflow handoff.
verdict: Clean, code-focused skill with no security concerns found — no network calls, secrets, or destructive commands. Reasonably actionable with named files and a numbered workflow, but has no negative-trigger guidance, no failure-path coverage, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope guidance anywhere; a technical skill this specific should point away from adjacent tasks.
No mention anywhere of what to do if a referenced file, type, or handler is missing/conflicting.
Step 1 'Decide whether the use case is synchronous or quiet background work' has no explicit decision rule of its own.
